achievements.title: Reluctant Companion
achievements.description: Maybe these two really do need my help...

achievements.title: Beautiful Buccaneer
achievements.description: Galuf and Bartz swoon at the pirate's beauty.

achievements.title: Get Well Soon
achievements.description: Checked up on your feathered friend.

achievements.title: Birdpuncher
achievements.description: Defeat the wing raptor using only the Attack command.

achievements.title: The Chosen Warriors
achievements.description: Obtain the crystal shards from the Wind Temple

achievements.title: A Heroic Party Is Formed
achievements.description: The four companions all agree to set out on a quest to save the world...

achievements.title: Thor's Might
achievements.description: Defeat Karlabos with the Thunder spell.

achievements.title: Flailure to Account for Amnesia
achievements.description: Defeat Siren using only Galuf to target Siren, dealing damage only with Flail attacks.

achievements.title: Ice to Meet You
achievements.description: Defeat Magissa with a Frost Rod before Forza is summoned.

achievements.title: Caring for Magical Creatures
achievements.description: Enlisted the aid of a Wind Drake

achievements.title: Family?
achievements.description: View a conversation at night on the ramparts of Castle Tycoon.

achievements.title: Icey Mirror Match
achievements.description: Defeat Shiva and her boys with 3x Front-Row Knights and 1x Back-Row Mage before the events at the top of the Tower of Walse.

achievements.title: Diamond Dust
achievements.description: Obtained the Shiva summon spell.

achievements.title: Garula Croaks Twice
achievements.description: Defeat Garula while it is a Toad

achievements.title: Too Late
achievements.description: Obtain the crystal shards from the Water Temple

achievements.title: Take a Bow
achievements.description: Make Liquid Flame Kill itself and win its Flame Bow

achievements.title: Blue Blaze
achievements.description: Learn the Iron Claw's blue magic at the gates of Karnark Castle.

achievements.title: Appropriation Ablaze
achievements.description: Loot all the treasures of Karnak Castle and escape before time runs out!

achievements.title: Explosive Escape
achievements.description: Obtained some of the blessings of the fire crystal.

achievements.title: Ifrit Debuffed
achievements.description: Kill Ifrit when he is under the influence of three or more status debuffs.

achievements.title: This Place Would Have Failed Their Safety Inspection
achievements.description: Obtained the Ifrit summon spell.

achievements.title: Book Burning
achievements.description: Defeat Byblos with Ifrit

achievements.title: Cidstoration
achievements.description: Obtained the use of the Fire-Powered Ship

achievements.title: You're Our Only Hope
achievements.description: Obtain the crystal shards from the Fire Temple

achievements.title: All About That Bartz
achievements.description: View all Bartz scenes in his hometown.

achievements.title: Ramufications of Visiting the Library First
achievements.description: Obtained the Ramuh summon spell.

achievements.title: Toadally Worth The Spin
achievements.description: Learn the Toad spell from a flower-bound frog.

achievements.title: Whips for Law Abiders
achievements.description: Recover the Blitz Whip from the Jachol Cave

achievements.title: Holey Terror
achievements.description: Kill the Sandworm using only Multi-Target abilities. [Note: Rapid-Fire is not considered by the game to be Mult-Target]

achievements.title: Slumberstorm
achievements.description: Kill Cray Claw while it is asleep.

achievements.title: Fly the Crazy Skies
achievements.description: Gained the use of the ancient airship

achievements.title: Family Secret
achievements.description: View a conversation at night in the bedroom of Castle Tycoon.

achievements.title: One Skill One Kill
achievements.description: Kill the Adamantoise without selecting more than one non-Defend action.

achievements.title: Fight Firepower with Fire Focused Fighters
achievements.description: Defeat the Soulcannon and Launchers with four different fire crystal jobs and having only fire crystal secondary abilities equipped. You may leave the secondary ability empty.

achievements.title: I Like You Just the Way You Are And Also Dead
achievements.description: Defeat Archeoavis without it changing forms/weaknesses.

achievements.title: The Return
achievements.description: Obtain the crystal shards from the Earth Temple

achievements.title: Memories of Long Ago Fears
achievements.description: Faris dreams about her childhood.

achievements.title: Stun the Earth
achievements.description: Kill Titan while he is paralyzed.

achievements.title: Bomb Diffusers
achievements.description: Defeat Purobolos without any of them attempting to cast Arise.

achievements.title: Behold the Power of Chemistry!
achievements.description: Defeat Manticore with a !Mix.

achievements.title: A Whole New World
achievements.description: Follow Galuf back to his home

achievements.title: Who Mugs the Muggers?
achievements.description: On the deserted island, steal the Abductor's armor and then kill it.

achievements.title: Gilgamesh Dis-armed
achievements.description: Defeat Gilgamesh on the Big Bridge without letting him buff himself up.

achievements.title: Barrier to Escape
achievements.description: Galuf and friends make their escape in an unconventional fashion...

achievements.title: Workin' Hard for Your Money
achievements.description: Earn some cash for dancing.

achievements.title: Pub Pals
achievements.description: Share a drink with Galuf and soothe your worried mind.

achievements.title: Jumping Jehosephat!
achievements.description: Galuf makes a discovery in Kuza

achievements.title: No Tinctures for Tiny Arms
achievements.description: Defeat Tyrannosaur without targetting it with !White, !Mix, or !Items.

achievements.title: Moogle Says
achievements.description: Exit the Underground Waterway and reach the Moogle Village forest without being attacked [Triggers at reaching the forest itself].

achievements.title: Regal Entrance
achievements.description: Successfully returned from the northern continent after being stranded there.

achievements.title: I Wanna Be a Shopkeep!
achievements.description: Try to help out and get gifted a Lamia Harp.

achievements.title: Does This Mean I'm King Now?
achievements.description: Retrieved a submerged great sword.

achievements.title: Well-Wizard Well-Being
achievements.description: Obtained the Kornago Gourd

achievements.title: Sheepish Delight
achievements.description: Harm a local economy by eating all of the local dish.

achievements.title: Rockstar
achievements.description: Obtain the Golem summon in Drakenvale

achievements.title: Lenna Saves the Day
achievements.description: Defeat Dragon Pod without it being damaged by anyone besides Lenna. (Note: Continuous sources of damage such as poison are treated as non-Lenna sources of damage)

achievements.title: Sacrificial Heart
achievements.description: Save Krile's wind drake.

achievements.title: Genji Gloves
achievements.description: Steal the Genji Gloves from Gilgamesh and complete the battle.

achievements.title: Show Him Who's Boss
achievements.description: Defeat Gilgamesh on the boat in one move after Enkidu is summoned.

achievements.title: Let Me Show You How Much You Suck
achievements.description: Defeat Atomos within two moves. ['Move' here means anything affecting Atomos]

achievements.title: Old Heroes Die Hard
achievements.description: Destroyed the barrier blocking the way to the castle.

achievements.title: I Caught a Friend for You on the Way Here
achievements.description: Defeat Catoblepas in Galuf's World with !Release and earn its summon.

achievements.title: Corresponding Crystal Crushers
achievements.description: During four guardian crystals battle, each crystal must only be damaged by the character whose role matches its element [Bartz=Wind, Lenna=Water, Faris=Fire, Galuf=Earth]

achievements.title: Error: Success
achievements.description: Uncovered the villain's plan in the Forest of Moore

achievements.title: The Price of Greed
achievements.description: Defeat a Gil Turtle in the Gil Cave

achievements.title: Testudine Triumph
achievements.description: Collect all the gil in the Corridor of Gil in the Gil Cave and take one more step...

achievements.title: This Looks Like a Job for Catoblepas!
achievements.description: Finish off Carbuncle with Catoblepas

achievements.title: Genji Helm
achievements.description: Steal the Genji Helm from Gilgamesh and complete the battle.

achievements.title: Gilgamesh Gives His Regards
achievements.description: Finish off Exdeath in his Castle with the Excalipoor

achievements.title: Oh Exdeath, Where is Your Sting?
achievements.description: An evil foe has fallen and the world is changed forever...

achievements.title: This is for Edward!
achievements.description: Kill the Antlion without it fleeing

achievements.title: Two Halves Become One
achievements.description: Learn how Exdeath may be defeated

achievements.title: Heights of Bravery and Courage of Cowardice
achievements.description: Obtain a maximum power Brave Blade or Chicken Knife

achievements.title: It's a Sehkmet to Everybody
achievements.description: Defeat Sehkmet
achievements.notes: Sehkmet found in the Cloister of the Dead

achievements.title: Tomb-Raiding Trio
achievements.description: Enter the Pyramid and claim the first tablet having obtained all the treasures and defeating all robots in one trip without restoring MP. Must be done in a single session without loading mid-pyramid.

achievements.title: Mechas and Mummies
achievements.description: Recover the Tablet from the Pyramid

achievements.title: Welcome Weakness
achievements.description: Defeat Melusine without her using Barrier Change

achievements.title: Thanks, Matey
achievements.description: Enlist the aid of a lost friend...

achievements.title: Wishmaster
achievements.description: Obtain the Magic Lamp

achievements.title: KaratEgg
achievements.description: Perform the legendary 'Egg Chop' attack

achievements.title: Yer nuts, mister!
achievements.description: Go around the world in a Chocobo and receive the Mirage Vest

achievements.title: Odin Outdone
achievements.description: Defeat Odin with 40 or more seconds remaining without resorting to Zeninage.

achievements.title: Stair-based Strength Supplementation
achievements.description: Climb the Phoenix Tower and choose to fight every door guardian.

achievements.title: Friendship Reborn
achievements.description: Obtain the Phoenix Summon

achievements.title: Flare for the Undramatic
achievements.description: Defeat Bahamut without him using Mega Flare. [No Zeninage allowed]

achievements.title: Wendigoner
achievements.description: Kill Wendigo using only Multi-Target abilities that aren't Zeninage. [Note: Rapid-Fire is not considered by the game to be Mult-Target]

achievements.title: Dungeons and Ductwork
achievements.description: Recover the Tablet from the Island Shrine

achievements.title: Oops I Chose the Wrong Party I
achievements.description: Kill Minotaur with only Mages and Summoners. No Abilities belonging to the forbidden classes allowed. [Mage = Any class that ends in Mage]

achievements.title: Oops I Chose the Wrong Party II
achievements.description: Kill Omniscient with only non-Mage, non-Summoner classes. No Abilities belonging to the forbidden classes allowed. [Mage = Any class that ends in Mage]

achievements.title: Fork That
achievements.description: Obtained the Legendary White and Black Magic spells.

achievements.title: Mr. Clio, Your Psychic Friend
achievements.description: Pay a visit to the statsman Clio

achievements.title: Speedy Swimmer
achievements.description: Obtain the mysterious power in Sunken Walse Tower and return to the surface in one long breath with 3 minutes or more remaining. No extra oxygen allowed!

achievements.title: Cut That Out
achievements.description: Defeat Triton, Nereid, and Phobos at the same time without having ever damaged them.

achievements.title: Hotchachachaaa
achievements.description: Obtained the tablet from the Great Sea Trench

achievements.title: Splish Splash
achievements.description: Obtained the tablet from Istory Falls

achievements.title: Battle of the Seabeasts
achievements.description: Defeat Leviathan dealing damage only with Syldra without equipping Coral Rings

achievements.title: The Legendary Twelve
achievements.description: They are weapons. They are legendary. There are even twelve of them

achievements.title: Prepare for the Inevitable Victory
achievements.description: Defeat Calofisteri without releasing the Confirm button for the entire fight.

achievements.title: Omega Badge
achievements.description: Defeat Omega, the original killing machine

achievements.title: Slowmega Nomega
achievements.description: Defeat Omega in the Rift while it's under the effects of a Slow debuff.

achievements.title: Mr. Scaredy Book
achievements.description: Make Apanda scared, then complete the battle.

achievements.title: Now You Try It
achievements.description: Trick Azulmagia into destroying himself via means other than reflect.

achievements.title: We All Float Down Here
achievements.description: Defeat Catastrophe without taking any damage.

achievements.title: Holy Toads!
achievements.description: Defeat Halicarnassus while your entire party is a living toad and without dealing damage to her during your characters' turns.

achievements.title: You're Grounded!
achievements.description: Kill Twintania with one move.

achievements.title: Genji Shield
achievements.description: Steal the Genji Shield from Gilgamesh and complete the battle.

achievements.title: Dragon Seal
achievements.description: Defeat Shinryu, the demon dragon

achievements.title: I've Got All the Time in the World
achievements.description: Deal fatal damage to Shinryu with the HP leak status effect.

achievements.title: Genji Armor
achievements.description: Steal the Genji Armor from Gilgamesh and complete the battle.

achievements.title: Let's Cut Through This Nonsense
achievements.description: Destroy all of Necrophobe's Barriers with !Finisher or !Bladeblitz, then complete the fight.

achievements.title: Magic Doesn't Grow on Trees, You Know
achievements.description: Completely deplete the final boss's tree form of MP before finishing it off.

achievements.title: Mix and Math
achievements.description: Destroy all four parts of the final boss's final form using L5 Death

achievements.title: Warriors of Light
achievements.description: Beat the game

achievements.title: Unsealed Horrors
achievements.description: Gained entry to the Arena in the Sealed Temple by proving your worth to the man in the River of Souls

achievements.title: Softened Him Up
achievements.description: Defeated the Grand Aevis

achievements.title: Unlocking the Void
achievements.description: Defeated the Archeodemon

achievements.title: Machinations of a Madman
achievements.description: Clear out all the Omegas in the Tomb of Memory - Incubi's Path without leaving the room.

achievements.title: Force Shield
achievements.description: Defeat Omega Mk.II

achievements.title: Neo Demon Dragon
achievements.description: Defeat Neo Shinryu

achievements.title: Decontaminated Defense Destroyer
achievements.description: Defeat Guardian with everyone alive and unpetrified.

achievements.title: The True Power of the Void
achievements.description: Defeat Enuo

achievements.title: True Warriors
achievements.description: Obtain every crystal shard

achievements.title: Boss Rush
achievements.description: Clear the Cloister of the Dead

achievements.title: The Traditional Swordsman
achievements.description: Master the Knight job with any character.

achievements.title: Don't Think, Feel!
achievements.description: Master the Monk job with any character.

achievements.title: Band of Thieves
achievements.description: Master the Thief job with any character.

achievements.title: Wind Rinder
achievements.description: Master the Dragoon job with any character.

achievements.title: Hokage
achievements.description: Master the Ninja job with any character.

achievements.title: Rurouni
achievements.description: Master the Samurai job with any character.

achievements.title: Skull Buster
achievements.description: Master the Berserker job with any character.

achievements.title: Marksman
achievements.description: Master the Ranger job with any character.

achievements.title: Spellblade Master
achievements.description: Master the Mystic Knight job with any character.

achievements.title: Healer
achievements.description: Master the White Mage job with any character.

achievements.title: Destroyer
achievements.description: Master the Black Mage job with any character.

achievements.title: Master of Time and Space
achievements.description: Master the Time Mage job with any character.

achievements.title: Kuchiyose no Jutsu
achievements.description: Master the Summoner job with any character.

achievements.title: Monster Scholar
achievements.description: Master the Blue Mage job with any character.

achievements.title: Ebony and Ivory
achievements.description: Master the Red Mage job with any character.

achievements.title: Animal Lover
achievements.description: Master the Beastmaster job with any character.

achievements.title: Trial and Error
achievements.description: Master the Chemist job with any character.

achievements.title: Child of the Earth
achievements.description: Master the Geomancer job with any character.

achievements.title: The Music Man
achievements.description: Master the Bard job with any character.

achievements.title: A One and a Two...
achievements.description: Master the Dancer job with any character.

achievements.title: The Walking Death
achievements.description: Master the Necromancer job with any character.

achievements.title: Prediction Machine
achievements.description: Master the Oracle job with any character.

achievements.title: Blistering Bombardment
achievements.description: Master the Cannoneer job with any character.

achievements.title: Maximus Decimus Meridius
achievements.description: Master the Gladiator job with any character.

achievements.title: Master of Mimicry
achievements.description: Master the Mime job with any character.

achievements.title: Grandmaster
achievements.description: Master every job with every character

achievements.title: Holy Avenger
achievements.description: Obtain every white magic spell

achievements.title: Destruction Master
achievements.description: Obtain every black magic spell

achievements.title: Immortal
achievements.description: Obtain every time magic spell

achievements.title: Avan De Ziniur III
achievements.description: Obtain every spellblade

achievements.title: Extra Sensory Perception
achievements.description: Obtain every summon

achievements.title: Mega Man
achievements.description: Obtain every blue magic spell

achievements.title: Pop Idol
achievements.description: Obtain every song

achievements.title: Dark Lord
achievements.description: Obtain every dark art

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter I
achievements.description: Obtain every treasure from the 1st world

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter II
achievements.description: Obtain every treasure from the 2nd world

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter III
achievements.description: Obtain every treasure from the merged world

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter IV
achievements.description: Obtain every treasure from the bonus dungeon

achievements.title: Treasure Master
achievements.description: Obtain every treasure from the game

achievements.title: Basic Hunter
achievements.description: Kill entries 1-34, 191, and 192 in the bestiary

achievements.title: World One Completionist
achievements.description: Kill entries 35-69 and 193-196 in the bestiary

achievements.title: Beast Slayer
achievements.description: Kill entries 243-265 in the bestiary

achievements.title: Advanced Hunter
achievements.description: Kill entries 70-86, 88-104 in the bestiary

achievements.title: World Two Completionist
achievements.description: Kill entries 105-134, 176, and 177 in the bestiary

achievements.title: Giant Slayer
achievements.description: Kill entries 266-285 in the bestiary

achievements.title: Expert Hunter
achievements.description: Kill entries 87, 135-161, 173-175, 184-190, and 197-203 in the bestiary

achievements.title: World Three Completionist
achievements.description: Kill entries 162-172, 178-183, and 204-228 in the bestiary

achievements.title: Superboss Slayer
achievements.description: Kill entries 286-314 in the bestiary

achievements.title: Bonus Hunter
achievements.description: Kill entries 229-242 and 315-323 in the bestiary
